author: IGN YouTube
text:
Guilty Gear Strive - Official Robo-Ky Character Reveal Trailer
Check out the play style of the second character in Season Pass 5, Robo-Ky, in this trailer for Guilty Gear Strive, an action fighting game developed by Arc System Works. Players can soon gain access to a new playable character with the Season Pass 5 as Robo-Ky takes to the fight. Robo-Ky is scheduled to be released on July 2, 2026, with Season Pass 5 of Guilty Gear Strive on PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC (Steam).

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
DarkSwarm - Official Gameplay Trailer
Get a look at action-packed gameplay from DarkSwarm in this trailer for the upcoming online co-op, top-down tactical shooter game. Play as a team of elite operators in procedurally generated, semi-destructible levels. Use your skills, wits, and teamwork to destroy the alien DarkSwarm in daring operations deep inside the infested colonies. DarkSwarm will be available in Steam Early Access.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Star Fox Review Discussion: Is a 30-Year-Old Remake Worth $50? - NVC Clips
This week, join Logan “Slippy” Plant, Brian “Leon” Altano, Seth “Wolf” Macy, and Jada “Fox” Griffin as they break down Jada’s review of Star Fox on Nintendo Switch 2. They discuss the improved graphics and cutscenes, the brand new challenge and multiplayer modes, and whether this remake is worth the $50 price tag. Plus, they discuss where the franchise should go from here, and if this is the Star Fox revival that will finally stick.

#starfox #nintendo #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Biggest Game Releases of July 2026
July is almost here, and the summer video game lineup is heating up with a massive mix of highly anticipated remakes, expansions, and incredible indie titles. In this monthly breakdown, we take a dive into some of the biggest games hitting consoles and PC, including Halo: Campaign Evolved with its Unreal Engine 5 overhaul, Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced, and the brutal new Revelations expansion for DOOM: The Dark Ages. From the cozy yet spooky vampire farming thrills of Moonlight Peaks to the sports-sim updates of EA Sports College Football 27 and Backyard Baseball, we’ve got your absolute must-play list covered right here.

No matter what your favorite gaming platform is, this month features a diverse release slate across PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch, and PC. Join us as we cover the official release dates, and launch platforms for some of the top July video games including Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok, Digimon Story: Time Stranger, and the Powerwash Simulator 2 Star Wars pack.

TIMECODES:
00:00 Intro, Rhythm Heaven Groove, Doom The Dark Ages Revelations, Moonlight Peaks, Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced
02:19 Backyard Baseball, EA Sports College Football 27, Granblue Fantasy Relink Endless Ragnarok, Digimon Story Time Stranger
03:52 Echoes of Aincrad, Ascend to Zero, Forensics Crime Scene Detective, The Mound Omen of Cthulhu
05:00 Denshattack, eBaseball Pro Spirit, Heave Ho 2, Culdcept Begins
06:15 Fitness Boxing 3 Your Personal Trainer, Instant Sports 2, Hyper Primate, Happy's Humble Burgatory
07:03 Pathogenic, The Guild Europa 1410, Ratatan, Powerwash Simulator Star Wars Pack,Raccoons To Riches
08:47 Disgaea Mayhem, Splatoon Raiders, Helix Ascent n Descent, Gurei, Theropods
09:36 An Eggstremely Hard Game, Skills & Raids, Halo Campaign Evolved, Gothic Classic 
11:27 Go North, Kusan City of Wolves, Truxton Extreme, Xenoblade Chronicles 2 and Definitive Edition
12:33 Corsair Cove, The Relic The First Guardian, Paw Patrol Dino World, Call of Duty Black Ops 1 and Call of Duty Black Ops 2

author: IGN YouTube
text:
GTA Chinatown Wars is the Unsung Hero of GTA Games
Grand Theft Auto 6 is about to change the world of video games forever but once upon a time a very different GTA game showed up in the least likely of places and secretly became one of the best games in the franchise. Let's talk about GTA Chinatown Wars.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Independence Day: The Last Handmade Blockbuster | IGN30 Art of the Scene
Independence Day took over the summer of 1996 like the alien invasion it inflicted onto big screens around the world, ushering in a new era of suped-up, cinematic spectacle. But Will Smith, Jeff Goldblum and Bill Pullman weren't the real stars of ID4. That honor goes to explosions. But the mid-90s were a fascinating time in Hollywood, transitioning from old school, traditional effects work into the age of CGI. Before computer effects wizardry became the answer to "how do we film this," Roland Emmerich, Dean Devlin and legions of artists, model-makers and pyrotechnics experts took one last swing at doing things the hard way, making Independence Day the last of the handmade blockbusters.

This Art of the Scene was written and narrated by Charlie Lopresto and edited by Lynette Guzman.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
A $799 Xbox?! Breaking Down Microsoft's Price Hike - Unlocked Clips
In this snippet from Podcasy Unlocked epsiode 747, Money is the name of the game this week, from Xbox's third round of price cuts that see the Series S now start at $500 and the Series X start at $750 to GTA coming in at $80 for the base game and $100 for the Ultimate Edition to the Steam Machine pricing reveal and what it might mean for Project Helix. 

Check out the full episode here! - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3gujnG-qbg4
This weeks show is hosted by Ryan McCaffrey, MIchael Higham, Miranda Sanchez, and is produced by Nick Maillet

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game - Official Console Pre Order Trailer
Don't miss the Pre Order Trailer for Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game, an upcoming 2D anime action fighting game based on the hit Avatar: The Last Airbender and The Legend of Korra series, developed by Gameplay Group International in collaboration with Paramount. Players will duke it out in action-packed battles with favorites from Team Avatar and The Legend of Korra, with key features such as rollback netcode, crossplay, and more for modern hardware. Seek victory in Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game, launching on July 23 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam), with an eventual release on Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2.


Preorder on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2424420/Avatar_Legends_The_Fighting_Game/

Wishlist on PS5: 
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10018989/

Wishlist on Xbox Series X|S: 
https://www.xbox.com/en-us/games/store/avatar-legends-the-fighting-game/9ph2332vrwsf

text:
Backroom Cleaners - Official Early Access Release Window Trailer
Don't miss the Early Access Release Window Trailer for Backroom Cleaners, a co-op action roguelike shooter developed by Hypercent Inc. Players will take on monstrous enemies from run to run with an assortment of weapons, abilities, and more. Backroom Cleaners is launching into Early Access in December 2026 for PC (Steam).
